syllabus.subject: YORÙBÁ
general_objectives: stimulate and sustain their interest in Yorùbá language, literature and culture;
acquire basic knowledge and skill in Yorùbá language, literature and material and non-material aspects of culture.

structure.contents_notes: 1. LANGUAGE: (a) Comprehension: (i) Prose, (ii) Verse. (b) Essay Writing: (i) Argumentative, (ii) Descriptive, (iii) Narrative, (iv) Letter Writing (Formal and Informal) etc. (c) Sound System: (i) Production of sounds (consonants and vowels); (ii) Tones and tone change; (iia) Syllable structure; and (iii) Sound processes co-vowel occurrence, elision, deletion, etc. (d) Grammar: (i) Morphology-Word-formation; (ii) Loan-word integration; (iii) Word classes nouns, verbs, adjectives, adverbs, pronouns, conjunctions, prepositions, etc.; (iv) Phrases and clauses types and functions; (v) Sentences types, structures and functions. (e) Current Orthography. (f) Translation.
objectives: identify central issues in a passage and draw appropriate conclusions;
determine basic assumptions and express ideas; and
identify the meanings and functions of given phrases and sentences.
identify different types of essay; and
apply different types of techniques associated with each type.
identify organs of speech, speech sounds and parameters for describing each speech sound;
determine their correct usages;
detect linguistic errors (pronunciations and wrong usages);
determine the syllable components of words; and
demonstrate knowledge of the basic principles underlying the relationship between sounds.
demonstrate good knowledge of word derivation;
demonstrate knowledge of word adoption;
identify the appropriate class a word belongs to;
demonstrate knowledge and understanding of Yorùbá syntax;
identify the types, structures and functions of sentences.
present ideas in acceptable written form.
interpret sentences and ideas in accordance with acceptable principles.

structure.contents_notes: 2. LITERATURE: (a) Oral Literature: Prose (Ìtàn Àròso): (i) Babalolá, A. (2023). Akójopò Àlọ́ Ijàpá (Apá Keji). Ìbàdàn: University Press Plc. Drama (Eré Oníṣe): (ii) Ogúnníran, L. (2022). Eégún Aláré. Ìbàdàn: Golden Pen Publishers. (b) Written Literature: Prose (Ìtàn Àròso): (i) Ìṣolá, A. (2023). Ogún Ọmodé. Ìbàdàn: University Press Plc. Poetry (Ewì): (ii) Adéwolé, O. (2023). Èdè Abínibí àti Àwọn Aròfò Míràn. Ìbàdàn: University Press Plc. pp 1-50 (2026), pp 51-83 (2027), pp 84-116 (2028), pp 117-152 (2029), pp 153-216 (2030). Drama (Eré Onítàn): (iii) Fádíyà, O. (2023). Ọtẹ̀ Oyẹ̀. Ìbàdàn: Genius Books Publishers.
objectives: identify central issues, problems and the component parts of ideas presented in the work of art;
draw moral lessons from the text;
identify the figurative and idiomatic expressions in the text; and
draw appropriate conclusions.
identify the type of drama;
extract the narrative techniques in the drama;
identify the figurative and idiomatic expressions in the drama;
identify the central theme of the work; and
interpret same in accordance with acceptable principles of the society.
demonstrate good knowledge of ideas in the work of art;
draw moral lessons from the text;
identify the narrative techniques in the text; and
identify the figurative and idiomatic expressions in the text.
deduce the import of written works of art and genres; and
identify the figurative and idiomatic expressions in the poem.
identify the central theme of the work;
interpret same in accordance with acceptable principles of the society;
identify types of drama;
identify the figurative and idiomatic expressions in the drama; and
extract the narrative techniques in the drama.

structure.contents_notes: 3. CULTURE: (a) Èrò àti Ìgbàgbọ́: Olódùmarè, àkùdàáyà, emèrè, àjẹ́, àwọn irúnmọlẹ̀, abbl. (b) Ètò Ìṣèlú àti Ààbò Ìlú: Ẹgbẹ́ àti ọgbà, oyè jíjẹ àti àwọn ijòyè, ogun jíjà, abbl. (c) Ètò Ìsìnkú àti Ogún Pínpín: Okú àgbà, òkú ofò, òkú òòṣà, ìtúfò, ilẹ̀ òkú gbígbe, idí igi, mọ̀lébí, bàbá ìsìnkú, abbl. (d) Ònkà Yorùbá: Oókan títí dé ọkẹ́ kan (1-20,000). (e) Ètò Ìgbéyàwó àti Ìṣọmọlórúkọ: Gbogbo ohun tọ́ rọ mọ ìgbéyàwó àti ìṣọmọlórúkọ. (f) Ètò Ìwòsàn: Ìtójú aláisàn, ìtójú àti ìgbebí aboyún, abbl. (g) Eré Ìdárayá: i) eré òsùpá - àlọ́, bojúbojú, ìjakadì, abbl; ii) eré ojúmọmọ - ayò, òkòtó, àrín, abbl. (h) Ìṣẹ́ Abínibí àti Oúnjẹ Ilẹ̀ Yorùbá: (i) Iṣẹ́-àgbẹ, iṣọ̀nà, ìlù lílù, abbl; (ii) Oúnjẹ àbàrí, iyán, ẹwà, abbl. (i) Ẹkọ́ Ilé: Ìwà ọmọlúàbí àti ànfààní rẹ̀.
objectives: distinguish traditional practices and acceptable ways of life from modern and common sense beliefs.
assess the functions and roles of individuals, chieftains, and groups in ensuring peace, stability and continuity of society.
distinguish between traditional practices; and
relate them to funerals and inheritance.
count in Yorùbá numerals; and
apply addition, deduction and division methods in Yorùbá.
relate social activities and events to appropriate situations.
demonstrate knowledge of the best way of using the appropriate health care practices.
identify types of Yorùbá traditional games;
identify rules and regulations guiding each game; and
mention values derived from each game.
demonstrate adequate knowledge of the various traditional professions;
compare various traditional professions;
demonstrate knowledge of preparing each type of Yorùbá food; and
mention nutritional values of each food.
identify acceptable patterns of behaviour and attitude that conform with societal norms and values.

recommended_texts: Abíódún, J. (1995). Àròkọ àti Ààyàn Ogbufo, Lagos: MAJAB Publishers.
Adéwolé, L. O. (et al) (2000). Exam Focus - Yorùbá Language for WASSCE/SSCE, Ìbàdàn: UP Plc.
Awóbùlúyi, O. (1978). Essentials of Yorùbá Grammar, Ìbàdàn: UP Plc.
Awóbùlúyi, O. (ed.) (1990). Yorùbá Metalanguage (Èdè-Ìperí Yorùbá) Vol. II, Ìbàdàn: UP Plc.
Awóbùlúyi, O. (2008). Ẹkọ́ Ìṣẹdá-Ọ̀rọ̀ Yorùbá, Akure: Montem Paperback.
Awóbùlúyi, O. (2013). Ẹkọ́ Gírámà Èdè Yorùbá, Osogbo: Atman Ltd.
Babalolá, A. (ed.) (1991). Ìwé Ìmódộtun Yorùbá SSI - SSIII, Longman.
Bámgbóṣé, O.(ed.) (1984). Yorùbá Metalanguage (Èdè-Ìperí Yorùbá) Vol. 1, Ìbàdàn: UP Plc.
Bámgbóṣé, A. (1990). Fọnólójì àti Gírámà Yorùbá, Ìbàdàn.
Mustapha, O. (ed.) (1988). Eko-Èdè Yorùbá Òde-òní SSI-SSIII, Macmillian Publishers.
Mustapha, O. (ed.) (1991). Eko-Èdè Yorùbá Titun SSI-SSIII, Ìbàdàn: UP Plc.
Odétọ́kun, A. (et al) (2005). Ìwé Ìgbáradi fún Ìdánwó Yorùbá, Ìbàdàn: Macmillan Publishers.
Owólabí, K. (1989). Ìjinlẹ̀ Ìtúpalẹ̀ Èdè Yorùbá (1) Fónétíki àti Fọnólójì, Ìbàdàn: Oníbonòjé Press.
Owólabí, O. (et al) (1999). Countdown WASSCE/SSCE, NECO, JME (Ìwé Ìgbáràdi fún Ìdánwó Aṣekágbá Yorùbá) Ìbàdàn: Evans.
Qyádèyí, O. (1998). Ìjìnlẹ̀ Fọnólójì àti Gírámà Èdè Yorùbá, Ìbàdàn: Heinemann.
Adéoyè, C. L. (1979). Aṣà àti Ìṣe Yorùbá, Ìbàdàn: OUP.
Adéoyè, C. L. (1985). Ìgbàgbó àti ìsìn Yorùbá, Ìbàdàn: Oníbonojé Press.
Ládélé, T. A. (et al) (1986). Akójopò Ìwádií Ìjìnlẹ̀ Yorùbá, Ìbàdàn: Macmillian Publishers.
syllabus.note: For structure and translation consistency, refer to the document format established in Yoruba.pdf.
